narrative:
Port Clinton 2A (precinct in Ottawa County) has 1,092 registered voters, with 57.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.7%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.6 percentage points.
